name: Buttermilk Cheese Bread (1-1/2# Loaf)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sharp cheddar cheese, grated; additional sharp or 1/2 cup blue and 1/2 cup cheddar
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
2. Verify that liquids (and warmed ingredients) are between 120-130 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Add the ingredients in the order specified: yeast, bread flour, baking powder, salt, sugar, buttermilk, warm water, and grated cheddar cheese (with additional sharp or half cup blue and half cup cheddar).
4. Proceed with white bread setting.
